description: Enforce a bookmark retention policy on the Nx Witness VMS system (https://localhost:7001, admin/Admin1234!) using the REST API. Delete all bookmarks older than 30 days based on their 'startTimeMs', unless the description contains 'LegalHold' (case-insensitive). Save a log file listing the IDs of the deleted bookmarks to /home/ga/Documents/retention_log.txt.
